  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the primary concern of embedding AI governance and fairness in financial services risk?",
      "options": ["A) Increasing efficiency", "B) Reducing costs", "C) Preventing bias and ensuring fairness", "D) Enhancing customer experience"],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "Embedding AI governance and fairness in financial services risk is primarily concerned with preventing bias and ensuring fairness to prevent harm to vulnerable groups."
